retry_reason: Decrementing a refcount that is already at zero indicates a use-after-free bug; retrying would double-free. The operation always succeeds if used correctly.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases a reference on an ip_vs_conn object. The caller must have previously acquired a reference (e.g., via a get operation or allocation) and must not use the object after calling this function unless it holds another reference. The function includes a full memory barrier to ensure proper ordering of prior writes before the decrement. It is the release side of the reference-count lifecycle and must be called exactly once for each reference acquired.
